rules: Use commands-rtk as the CLI bridge for MCP agents — it wraps shell commands with RTK token optimization, audit logging, and structured error handling
commands-rtk extends rtk-ai/rtk with MCP integration: audit logs in JSONL, per-client isolation, and structured tool responses
Pair with oh-my-mcp for lifecycle management — commands-rtk runs as an MCP server under the oh-my-mcp gateway, not as a standalone daemon
The CLI bridge pattern is for execute/write operations — queries should go through typed MCP tools instead
commands-rtk captures exit codes, duration, stdout/stderr, and error categories for every execution
